items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Qilin Ransomware Affiliates Abuse CVE-2026-0257 to Gain Unauthorized VPN Access
id: 287e5828-3214-50bf-85f7-a6fae2e4509d
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-0257 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RANSOMWARE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-0257
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/21
modified: 2026/07/21
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_encrypt:
        TargetFilename|endswith:
            - '.locked'
            - '.encrypted'
            - '.crypted'
            - '.enc'
        EventID: 11
    selection_ransomnote:
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - 'README'
            - 'HOW_TO_DECRYPT'
            - 'RECOVER_FILES'
    selection_vssdelete:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'vssadmin delete shadows'
            - 'wmic shadowcopy delete'
            - 'bcdedit /set'
    condition: selection_encrypt or selection_ransomnote or selection_vssdelete
falsepositives:
    - Encryption software (VeraCrypt, BitLocker) in use
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-0257 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-21T17:30:12Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-0257", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-0257 Exploitation Attempt - RANSOMWARE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"vssadmin"; nocase; content:"delete shadows"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5805001; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-21, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-56170 – .NET Denial of Service Vulnerability
items.description:
# Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-56170 – .NET Denial of Service Vulnerability

## Executive summary

Microsoft is releasing this security advisory to provide information about a vulnerability in ASP.NET Core SignalR (Microsoft.AspNetCore.App.Runtime). This advisory also provides guidance on what developers can do to update their applications to remove this vulnerability.

A denial of service vulnerability exists in ASP.NET Core SignalR in .NET 8, .NET 9, and .NET 10. Stateful reconnect can be leveraged by an attacker to deny service to other users.

## Announcement

Announcement for this issue can be found at https://github.com/dotnet/announcements/issues/**TBD**

## CVSS Details

- **Version:** 3.1
- **Severity:** High
- **Score:** 7.5
- **Vector:** `CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H/E:U/RL:O/RC:C`
- **Weakness:** CWE-770 (Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling)

## Affected Platforms

- **Platforms:** All
- **Architectures:** All

### Mitigation Factors
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window

items.title: Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-50527 – .NET Denial of Service Vulnerability
items.description: ## Executive summary Microsoft is releasing this security advisory to provide information about a vulnerability in .NET XML Encryption (System.Security.Cryptography.Xml). This advisory also provides guidance on what developers can do to update their applications to remove this vulnerability. A denial of service vulnerability exists in the XML encryption implementation (EncryptedXml) in .NET 8, .NET 9, and .NET 10. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by supplying crafted encrypted XML that is improperly validated, resulting in denial of service. ## Announcement Announcement for this issue can be found at https://github.com/dotnet/announcements/issues/**TBD** ## CVSS Details - **Version:** 3.1 - **Severity:** High - **Score:** 7.5 - **Vector:** `CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H` - **Weakness:** CWE-121 (Stack-based Buffer Overflow) ## Affected Platforms - **Platforms:** All - **Architectures:** All ## Affected Packages The vul

items.title: Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-47303 – .NET Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
items.description:
## Executive summary

Microsoft is releasing this security advisory to provide information about a vulnerability in ASP.NET Core Negotiate Authentication (Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.Negotiate). This advisory also provides guidance on what developers can do to update their applications to remove this vulnerability.

An elevation of privilege vulnerability exists in the ASP.NET Core Negotiate authentication handler in .NET 8, .NET 9, and .NET 10 due to improper parsing.

## Announcement

Announcement for this issue can be found at https://github.com/dotnet/announcements/issues/**TBD**

## CVSS Details

- **Version:** 3.1
- **Severity:** High
- **Score:** 8.8
- **Vector:** `CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H`
- **Weakness:** CWE-302 (Authentication Bypass by Assumed-Immutable Data), CWE-863 (Incorrect Authorization), CWE-90 (Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an LDAP Query ('LDAP Injection'))

## Affected Platforms

- **Platforms:** All
- **Architecture

items.title: Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-50650 – .NET Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
items.description: ## Executive summary Microsoft is releasing this security advisory to provide information about a vulnerability in Windows Presentation Foundation (WPF). This advisory also provides guidance on what developers can do to update their applications to remove this vulnerability. An elevation of privilege vulnerability exists in Windows Presentation Foundation (WPF) in .NET 8, .NET 9, and .NET 10 when parsing specially crafted XAML input. An attacker who successfully exploits this vulnerability could elevate privileges on the affected system. ## Announcement Announcement for this issue can be found at https://github.com/dotnet/announcements/issues/**TBD** ## CVSS Details - **Version:** 3.1 - **Severity:** High - **Score:** 7.8 - **Vector:** `CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H` - **Weakness:** CWE-94 (Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')) ## Affected Platforms - **Platforms:** Windows - **Architectures:** All ## Affected
